data.body: Fix applied: ticket-reducer.py line 384 — COMMENT handler now coerces non-string body to JSON string via isinstance check. ADF dicts from Jira sync serialized to string; empty non-string coerces to empty string. json module already imported. RED test added: test_comment_adf_dict_body_coerced_to_string (now GREEN). Also added: test_comment_body_with_embedded_json_survives_round_trip for 6831-8a22 coverage gap (passes both RED and GREEN).
